Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Underlord]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Underlord is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The production of an Underlord allowed the Jai clan to rise to prominence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Underlord is a title or rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Underlord is a rank above Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — An Underlord is a sacred artist who has reached the realm beyond Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Underlord is an entity that intends to arrive at the Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Underlord is a stage that is considered a distant dream for ordinary Iron practitioners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Underlord is a rank or title held by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Underlord is an advancement stage that follows Truegold.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Underlord is a person who could claim Fisher Gesha was neglecting Lindon's education.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Fisher Gesha told Lindon not to tell the Underlord she helped him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Underlord is responsible for the death of Kral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — An Underlord is a powerful rank/status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin addresses Eithan as Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Underlords weave soulfire and hoard it against emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Underlord raised a white spear into the sky.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The Underlords are waiting in the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — An Underlord can destroy someone with a casual backhand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Underlord is a rank Lindon could potentially reach in his fifties.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Underlord is a person to whom Lindon and Renfei must bring Lindon.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Underlords and above have bodies reforged by soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — It would take an Underlord at least to search for someone from many miles away using spiritual sense.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Underlord is a path or stage Yerin is focusing on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon suggested Yerin would be an Underlord if she had his chances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Reaching Underlord involves three steps: mastering yourself, mastering the world around you, and connecting to the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — The second step to reaching Underlord is sensing the unity of aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — The third step to reaching Underlord is discovering one's reason for practicing the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — An Underlord is a stage achieved by burning away one's old body and spirit through transformative resonance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The opponent was a lone Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Kiro has an Underlord body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Advancing to Underlord remakes the body and spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Underlord is a stage or rank Lindon has not yet reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Underlords are a rank of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Thirteen of the sixteen Underlords were gathered on the cloudship deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Underlords were dashing through trees and pitching Striker techniques at the Emperor's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Truegolds can stand up to Underlords.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Reaching Underlord allows senses to be cast wider and farther.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Sixteen young Underlords are candidates for the main Akura team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The gold dragon has the power of an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The man in the second trial revealed his spirit was an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — There were two Underlords who bowed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Fifteen young Underlords are in the center of the arena.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Ninecloud peacekeepers are Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Underlords hover on Thousand-Mile Clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Underlords advance by condensing their soulfire, filling themselves with it, and pushing their madra to the peak of power their souls can contain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Underlord is a stage or revelation Lindon has achieved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The two students watching the Sage are both Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — An Underlord enters the room carrying four boxes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Underlord revelation was based on seeing oneself clearly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — An Underlord is a level of power Ziel might settle for if he cannot regain Archlord status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Underlords are capable of walking right up to the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — An Underlord is a rank that Archlords and Heralds might not interfere with if they are in their grip.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Underlord is a level of power or status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Normally an Underlord cannot do anything to a Dreadgod.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Advancement to Underlord is expected to fix Jai Long's facial condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan refers to himself as an Underlord.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Underlords are entities that can be fought when dealing with a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos possesses Underlord strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is now an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — An Underlord attacked at the end of the chapter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — An Underlord can be defeated by a Striker technique.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Malice encouraged Mercy to reach Underlord.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Underlord is an advancement level.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
